_comment: Position-based sensitivity HEURISTIC for Qwen3-30B-A3B (48 MoE layers, indices 0-47). NOT measured. Pattern follows the DeepSeek-V2-Lite sensitivity observation: early layers (closer to embeddings) most sensitive, late layers (closer to output) less so. Middle layers moderately tolerant. Calibrated proportionally to DS pattern (last layer ≈ 1.0, peak ≈ 3.0 at ~25% depth). For a rigorous result, replace with cascade-protocol measurement on Qwen3.
